title: Characters from other worlds being Friends of the Eva Trio
display_title: Characters from other worlds being Friends of the Eva Trio
wikitext:
[]: Characters from other worlds being Friends of the Eva Trio?             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Mon Aug 06, 2012 1:23 am For this thread, if other characters from any other franchises managed to end up in the Eva World, which ones would likely able to develop a friendship with one or all of the the Eva Pilots? They can be from any franchise, Anime, Western, Video Games, etc. In my opinion, an ideal person to develop a friendship with the Eva Trio would be the Lovable Dork and Keyblade Master, Sora from Kingdom Hearts. A young teenager with a strong heart, this guy will defend others from harm, despite not even knowing the people he's saving. He’s the kind of guy that wants to be friends with everyone he meets. True, he's a little gullible and naïve, but he has a strong sense of justice and knows what to do that’s right. In my opinion, Sora is the Ideal person that Shinji needs as a friend, like Kaworu, but a whole lot less creepy and a hell of a lot less backstabbing. He'd probably easily develop a friendship with Shinji that would easily help Shinji's self-esteem. He doesn’t like to hold grudges, he easily forgives his friends for mistakes, and he loves to help others in need. So, yeah, I think Sora would be the best bet for Shinji as a friend. For Asuka, a friendship with him is a little bit more difficult, but I still think it’s fairly possible. I would imagine Asuka easily getting annoyed by Sora’s easygoing nature, and would probably call him “BAKA!” on a more regular basis than Shinji. Not because he’s stupid, but because he’s such a lovable dork. I can easily imagine their relationship as that of a bickering sister and brother, always getting on each other’s nerves, (well, more Asuka than Sora ). Sora would probably just tease Asuka because of his easy-going nature, but I do have a feeling that it may bite him in the butt when things start to get “serious” around Asuka. Hopefully, he knows when to back off. Now, for Rei, that’s a little trickier. I would imagine that he could develop a friendship with her, but it would be a little bit more difficult to get through her tough shell. I would mostly imagine him trying to teach Rei how to smile (both figuratively and literally) and try to teach her how to be more expressing and “fun”. Whether or not she would be receptive to his “lessons”, I’m not sure. I would expect that she would tolerate his “weird” behavior at first, but it may begin to grow on her.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 06, 2012 1:41 am Such musings as I've made on the subject have always been in the context of crossover-fics, and with the intent of finding Shinji a more suitable (less out of his league) girlfriend than the original series offered as options -- I have quite the soft spot for the Shinji/Wakaba pairing from Shin Kakumei Evangelion , for example

[]:             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Mon Aug 06, 2012 7:38 am Yuki from Mirai Nikki being friends with Shinji. They´re not even very different.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Aug 06, 2012 6:26 pm Yuki Nagato and Rei should be penpals.

[]:             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Mon Aug 06, 2012 11:40 pm Radical Edward pilots Eva.

[]: Crossover, eh?             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Tue Aug 07, 2012 5:13 am Mr. Tines wrote: Such musings as I've made on the subject have always been in the context of crossover-fics, and with the intent of finding Shinji a more suitable (less out of his league) girlfriend than the original series offered as options

[]: Re: Crossover, eh?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 07, 2012 5:02 pm Alaska Slim wrote: I'm a bit perplexed, are you inferring Asuka in saying that? I've heard you often state how you thought he and Rei could slowly push their boundaries together

[]:             Quote Post by Ashnod » Tue Aug 07, 2012 9:57 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Such musings as I've made on the subject have always been in the context of crossover-fics, and with the intent of finding Shinji a more suitable (less out of his league) girlfriend than the original series offered as options -- I have quite the soft spot for the Shinji/Wakaba pairing from Shin Kakumei Evangelion , for example

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Wed Aug 08, 2012 12:12 pm Kyon. His smartarsery would be a welcome addition to the Evaverse.

[]:             Quote Post by Der Kommissar » Wed Aug 08, 2012 1:44 pm Kyon and Shinji would passive-aggressive each other to death.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Wed Aug 08, 2012 4:11 pm Kamina...that is all. Him and Shinji could be bros.

[]:             Quote Post by evafan76 » Sun Aug 12, 2012 3:47 pm Der Kommissar wrote: Kyon and Shinji would passive-aggressive each other to death.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Wed Aug 15, 2012 5:43 pm For SKU: Utena would probably try to become friends with Shinji and Rei, but she'd dislike Asuka for the same reason she dislikes Nanami. I ship Shiori/Shinji myself.

[]:             Quote Post by CaasiBoy » Thu Aug 16, 2012 12:54 pm SaVaGe wrote: Radical Edward pilots Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Joe » Thu Aug 16, 2012 5:29 pm Hum... Eva-00 piloting Eva-01, why not ?

[]:             Quote Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Thu Aug 16, 2012 5:37 pm Shinji hangs out with Ichigo and company, Rei gets along with Uryu, and Kaworu goes on to become new lieutenant of SQD1............ ......... Alternatively, Shinji befriends Subaru, Asuka gets "befriended" so to speak and Kaworu begins dating Ginga and they become part of Riot Force 6...

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Aug 16, 2012 5:43 pm SaVaGe wrote: Radical Edward pilots Eva.
